Simple pricing for employers

Choose a plan that fits your hiring needs and start reaching qualified candidates today.

Basic

Free

Post a single job listing

  • 1 job listing
  • 30 days visibility
  • Standard placement

Featured

ETB 1,500

Get priority placement and more reach

  • 5 job listings
  • 60 days visibility
  • Featured badge
  • Telegram channel boost

Enterprise

Custom

For high-volume hiring teams

  • Unlimited listings
  • Dedicated account manager
  • Employer branding page
  • API access
